Bash(python -c "
import asyncio
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, ''.''\)

from app.services.ubs_southbound_crawler import ubs_southbound_crawler

async def test\(\):
    print\(''Testing UBS date list endpoint...''\)
    dates = await ubs_southbound_crawler.fetch_available_dates\(period=1\)
    print\(f''Available dates: {dates}''\)
    
    if dates:
        print\(f''Testing southbound flow with auto-fetched dates...''\)
        result = await ubs_southbound_crawler.fetch_southbound_flow\(auto_fetch_dates=True\)
        print\(f''Result success: {result.get\(""success""\)}''\)
        if result.get\(''success''\):
            data = result.get\(''data'', {}\)
            print\(f''Date range: {data.get\(""date_from""\)} to {data.get\(""date_to""\)}''\)
            print\(f''Total inflow: {data.get\(""total_inflow""\)} 亿''\)
            print\(f''Total outflow: {data.get\(""total_outflow""\)} 亿''\)
            print\(f''Net inflow: {data.get\(""net_inflow""\)} 亿''\)
    else:
        print\(''Failed to get available dates''\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import asyncio
import sys

# Direct import without going through __init__.py
import importlib.util
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location\(''ubs_southbound_crawler'', ''app/services/ubs_southbound_crawler.py''\)
crawler_module = importlib.util.module_from_spec\(spec\)
spec.loader.exec_module\(crawler_module\)

ubs_crawler = crawler_module.UBSSouthboundCrawler\(\)

async def test\(\):
    print\(''Testing UBS date list endpoint...''\)
    dates = await ubs_crawler.fetch_available_dates\(period=1\)
    print\(f''Available dates: {dates}''\)
    
    if dates:
        print\(f''Testing southbound flow with auto-fetched dates...''\)
        result = await ubs_crawler.fetch_southbound_flow\(auto_fetch_dates=True\)
        print\(f''Result success: {result.get\(""success""\)}''\)
        if result.get\(''success''\):
            data = result.get\(''data'', {}\)
            print\(f''Date range: {data.get\(""date_from""\)} to {data.get\(""date_to""\)}''\)
            print\(f''Total inflow: {data.get\(""total_inflow""\)} 亿''\)
            print\(f''Total outflow: {data.get\(""total_outflow""\)} 亿''\)
            print\(f''Net inflow: {data.get\(""net_inflow""\)} 亿''\)
    else:
        print\(''Failed to get available dates''\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import asyncio
import importlib.util

# Direct import without going through __init__.py
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location\(''sina_hot_stocks_crawler'', ''app/services/sina_hot_stocks_crawler.py''\)
crawler_module = importlib.util.module_from_spec\(spec\)
spec.loader.exec_module\(crawler_module\)

sina_crawler = crawler_module.SinaHotStocksCrawler\(\)

async def test\(\):
    print\(''Testing Sina hot stocks endpoint...''\)
    result = await sina_crawler.fetch_hot_stocks\(stock_type=''hot_hk'', limit=10\)
    print\(f''Success: {result.get\(""success""\)}''\)
    if result.get\(''success''\):
        data = result.get\(''data'', {}\)
        print\(f''Stock type: {data.get\(""stock_type""\)}''\)
        print\(f''Count: {data.get\(""count""\)}''\)
        print\(f''HQ Time: {data.get\(""hq_time""\)}''\)
        print\(f''HQ Status: {data.get\(""hq_status""\)}''\)
        print\(''''\)
        print\(''Top 5 hot stocks:''\)
        for i, stock in enumerate\(data.get\(''stocks'', []\)[:5], 1\):
            print\(f''  {i}. {stock[""symbol""]} {stock[""name""]} - Price: {stock[""lasttrade""]}, Change: {stock[""change_percent""]:.2f}%''\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import asyncio
import importlib.util

# Test the hot stocks crawler
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location\(''sina_hot_stocks_crawler'', ''app/services/sina_hot_stocks_crawler.py''\)
crawler_module = importlib.util.module_from_spec\(spec\)
spec.loader.exec_module\(crawler_module\)

sina_crawler = crawler_module.SinaHotStocksCrawler\(\)

async def test\(\):
    print\(''='' * 60\)
    print\(''Testing Sina hot stocks crawler''\)
    print\(''='' * 60\)
    
    result = await sina_crawler.fetch_hot_stocks\(stock_type=''hot_hk'', limit=20\)
    print\(f''Success: {result.get\(""success""\)}''\)
    
    if result.get\(''success''\):
        data = result.get\(''data'', {}\)
        print\(f''Count: {data.get\(""count""\)}''\)
        print\(f''HQ Time: {data.get\(""hq_time""\)}''\)
        print\(f''HQ Status: {data.get\(""hq_status""\)}''\)
        print\(''''\)
        print\(''Formatted text preview:''\)
        lines = [''[今日热门港股]'']
        lines.append\(f''  数据时间：{data.get\(""hq_time"", ""N/A""\)}''\)
        lines.append\(f''  市场状态：{data.get\(""hq_status"", ""N/A""\)}''\)
        lines.append\(''''\)
        
        for i, stock in enumerate\(data.get\(''stocks'', []\)[:5], 1\):
            name = stock.get\(''name'', ''N/A''\)
            symbol = stock.get\(''symbol'', ''N/A''\)
            lasttrade = stock.get\(''lasttrade'', 0\)
            change_percent = stock.get\(''change_percent'', 0\)
            amount = stock.get\(''amount'', 0\)
            pct_text = f''+{change_percent:.2f}%'' if change_percent > 0 else f''{change_percent:.2f}%''
            lines.append\(f''  {i}. {name} \({symbol}\): {lasttrade:.2f}港元 \({pct_text}\) 成交：{amount/10000:.2f}亿港元''\)
        
        for line in lines:
            print\(line\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
")
